# Atlas

> Atlas is an all-in-one field service management (FSM) platform for growing trade
> businesses — HVAC, plumbing, electrical, landscaping, and cleaning companies with
> roughly 1–15 technicians. It brings scheduling, dispatch, estimates, invoicing, and
> payments into one place, with transparent pricing and fast setup. Atlas is currently
> in early access (pre-launch).

## Key facts

- Category: Field service management (FSM) software
- Audience: Owner-operators and growing trade/home-service businesses (~1–15 techs)
- Trades served: HVAC, plumbing, electrical, landscaping, cleaning, and similar
- Core capabilities (in development): scheduling & dispatch, estimates → invoices →
  payments, a mobile app built to work with poor signal, and transparent published pricing
- Positioning: a modern, fairly priced alternative to legacy tools that are either too
  expensive (enterprise platforms) or too limited (cheap point tools)
- Status: Early access — onboarding businesses in waves; join the waitlist to get an invite
- Pricing: Transparent and published (no "contact sales" tiers); founding-customer pricing
  for early-access members

## Primary pages

- Home / early access: https://www.atlasfsm.com/
- Privacy Policy: https://www.atlasfsm.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://www.atlasfsm.com/terms
